message:
feat(fleet): implement SSH remote scanning for fleet mode (process_triage-db0)

Add ssh_scan module with parallel SSH-based remote scanning. The fleet
plan command now actually scans remote hosts via `ssh <host> pt-core scan
--format json` instead of returning empty stubs. Includes configurable
concurrency, timeouts, state-based process classification, and result
aggregation into fleet sessions with FDR control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
